creator: josef@augs4.iwan.limmat.ch
text:
the command for updating an additional machine ("make reinstall")
via nfs imported /usr/src and /usr/obj does not work. It fails
at various points with permission denied messages. It should *not*
be needed to create or generate any files, just simply install
the precompiled and pre-made docs etc.

Most of the time the make-script fails when it tries to create
the file osreldate.h.

How-To-Repeat: 
	
Just try it
